form.label: UseCase Detail - Drilldown
form.description: Detailansicht: Welcher Test hat welchen UseCase getriggert (oder nicht). Troubleshooting-Ansicht.

search.query: | inputlookup mitre_attack_bank_mapping.csv | search siem_usecase_id="$usecase_id$" | stats values(siem_usecase_name) as name values(technique_id) as techniques values(technique_name) as technique_names values(tactic) as tactics values(severity) as severity values(dora_article) as dora values(tiber_phase) as tiber values(description_de) as beschreibung by siem_usecase_id | rename siem_usecase_id as "UseCase ID" name as "Name" techniques as "MITRE Techniques" technique_names as "Technique Namen" tactics as "Taktiken" severity as "Schweregrad" dora as "DORA Artikel" tiber as "TIBER Phase" beschreibung as "Beschreibung"
index=siem_summary sourcetype="siem:usecase:triggered" usecase_id="$usecase_id$" earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count as c
index=siem_summary sourcetype="siem:usecase:triggered" usecase_id="$usecase_id$" earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count as c | eval status=if(c>0, "PASSED", "FAILED") | fields status

index=siem_summary sourcetype="siem:usecase:triggered" usecase_id="$usecase_id$" earliest=-7d latest=now | stats latest(_time) as lt | eval lt=if(isnotnull(lt), strftime(lt, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "Nie getriggert") | fields lt
index=caldera sourcetype="caldera:command:enriched" | lookup mitre_attack_bank_mapping technique_id OUTPUT siem_usecase_id | search siem_usecase_id="$usecase_id$" | stats count as c

index=caldera sourcetype="caldera:command:enriched" | lookup mitre_attack_bank_mapping technique_id OUTPUT siem_usecase_id siem_usecase_name technique_name tactic severity | search siem_usecase_id="$usecase_id$" | eval cmd_preview=if(len(command_decoded)>200, substr(command_decoded,1,200)."...", command_decoded) | eval triggered="Pruefe unten" | sort - _time | table _time operation_name host paw ability_name technique_id technique_name cmd_preview | rename _time as "Zeitstempel" operation_name as "Operation" host as "Host" paw as "Agent" ability_name as "Ability (Test)" technique_id as "MITRE ID" technique_name as "MITRE Technik" cmd_preview as "Ausgefuehrter Befehl"

index=siem_summary sourcetype="siem:usecase:triggered" usecase_id="$usecase_id$" | sort - _time | table _time operation_name host technique_id usecase_name alert_severity bank_risk dora_reference | rename _time as "Zeitstempel" operation_name as "Operation" host as "Host" technique_id as "MITRE ID" usecase_name as "UseCase" alert_severity as "Schweregrad" bank_risk as "Bank-Risiko" dora_reference as "DORA Referenz"
index=siem_summary sourcetype="siem:usecase:triggered" usecase_id="$usecase_id$" | timechart span=1h count as "Trigger"

| inputlookup mitre_attack_bank_mapping.csv | search siem_usecase_id="$usecase_id$" | fields technique_id technique_name | join type=left technique_id [search index=caldera sourcetype="caldera:command:enriched" earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count as test_count dc(host) as hosts values(ability_name) as abilities values(command_decoded) as commands by technique_id] | join type=left technique_id [search index=siem_summary sourcetype="siem:usecase:triggered" earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count as trigger_count by technique_id] | eval test_count=if(isnotnull(test_count), test_count, 0) | eval trigger_count=if(isnotnull(trigger_count), trigger_count, 0) | eval status=case( test_count=0 AND trigger_count=0, "NICHT GETESTET", test_count>0 AND trigger_count=0, "GETESTET - NICHT ERKANNT", test_count>0 AND trigger_count>0, "GETESTET + ERKANNT", test_count=0 AND trigger_count>0, "ERKANNT (ohne expliz. Test)") | table technique_id technique_name test_count trigger_count hosts abilities status | rename technique_id as "MITRE ID" technique_name as "Technik" test_count as "Test-Events" trigger_count as "Trigger-Events" hosts as "Getestete Hosts" abilities as "Caldera Abilities" status as "Status"

format.colorPalette: {"NICHT GETESTET":#999999,"GETESTET - NICHT ERKANNT":#DC4E41,"GETESTET + ERKANNT":#53A051,"ERKANNT (ohne expliz. Test)":#F8BE34}
